summary: Comprehensive testing of Hungarian car tuning community platform completed. Backend APIs working at 90% success rate, frontend fully functional with all major features tested including clubs, marketplace, and admin functionality.

minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - users cannot join pending clubs

minor_issues.issue: Club owner cannot leave own club

passed_tests: GET /api/clubs - Returns both approved clubs AND owner's pending clubs
POST /api/clubs - Creates club with pending status
GET /api/clubs/{club_id} - Returns club detail with membership info
GET /api/marketplace/listings/{listing_id} - Listing detail with view count increment
Frontend: Landing page loads with proper Hungarian branding
Frontend: Clubs page loads and shows clubs with pending status badge
Frontend: Club creation modal works and submits successfully
Frontend: Marketplace page loads and shows listings
Frontend: Search and filter functionality works (BMW search tested)
Frontend: Listing creation modal works and submits successfully
Frontend: Admin panel loads and shows proper data
Frontend: Admin tabs work correctly (clubs, marketplace)
Frontend: Navigation between all pages works smoothly

success_percentage.backend: 90% (18/20 tests passed - 2 expected business logic restrictions)
